---
title: "Unity Runner — Feature Tour"
filters:
  - unity-runner
---

## Connection

```{.unity title="Editor Status"}
unity-cli status
```


## Setup (runs once, cached on re-run)

```{.unity .setup title="Enter Play Mode" name="play"}
unity-cli editor play --wait
```


## Exec — C# inside Unity

```{.cs .unity title="Application Data Path" depends="play"}
return Application.dataPath;
```

```{.cs .unity title="Scene Root Objects" depends="play" usings="UnityEngine.SceneManagement"}
var scene = SceneManager.GetActiveScene();
var roots = scene.GetRootGameObjects();
foreach (var go in roots) Debug.Log(go.name);
return roots.Length + " root objects";
```


## Query — read-only inspection (cyan intent)

```{.cs .unity .query title="Frame Count" depends="play"}
return Time.frameCount.ToString();
```

```{.cs .unity .query title="World Systems (JSON)" depends="play" format="json" usings="System.Linq,Unity.Entities"}
var world = World.DefaultGameObjectInjectionWorld;
var names = world.Systems.Select(s => s.GetType().Name).OrderBy(n => n).ToArray();
return Newtonsoft.Json.JsonConvert.SerializeObject(names, Newtonsoft.Json.Formatting.Indented);
```


## Assert — verify expected output

```{.cs .unity .assert title="Unity Version Prefix" depends="play" expected="6000"}
return Application.unityVersion.Split('.')[0];
```

```{.unity .assert title="CLI Available" expected="0"}
unity-cli status > /dev/null 2>&1; echo $?
```


## CLI — shell commands

```{.unity title="Console Errors" depends="play"}
unity-cli console --type error
```

```{.unity title="Full Refresh"}
unity-cli editor refresh --compile
```


## Dependencies — automatic prerequisite resolution

Clicking **Run** on any block with `depends="play"` automatically
runs the "Enter Play Mode" setup block first (or replays its
cached result if already done).


## Multi-Command Pipelines

```{.unity title="Build Pipeline" depends="play" name="build"}
echo "=== compile ==="
unity-cli editor refresh --compile
echo "=== run tests ==="
unity-cli exec "Debug.Log(\"pipeline complete: \" + System.DateTime.Now);"
echo "=== logs ==="
unity-cli console --type log --lines 5
```


## Teardown

```{.unity .teardown title="Exit Play Mode"}
unity-cli editor stop
```


## Keyboard Shortcuts

| Shortcut | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl+Enter` | Run focused block (with deps) |
| `Ctrl+Shift+Enter` | Run all blocks sequentially |
